proposals.what: crypto_worker.py opens one SQLite connection with no threading.Lock — async loop + Optuna thread both call conn.execute/commit, risking corrupted sim_trades and running_stats tables.
proposals.expected_delta: Prevent torn writes, guarantee signal state consistency

proposals.axis: SYMBOL_BARS + BEST_PARAMS shared mutable state — async loop vs Optuna thread
proposals.what: Optuna thread reads SYMBOL_BARS deque and mutates BEST_PARAMS dict while async loop reads both. No synchronization. Partial reads mid-assignment possible.
proposals.expected_delta: Eliminate signal parameter aliasing and deque corruption under load

proposals.axis: Broadcast channel silently drops bars on slow consumer
proposals.what: ws_bridge.rs:234 matches Err(RecvError::Lagged(_)) with empty block — drops bars silently when Python crypto_worker falls behind. No log, no counter.
proposals.expected_delta: Zero silent bar loss; missed bars logged; alerts on gap

proposals.axis: Bar parse failures produce 0.0 OHLCV silently
proposals.what: binance_ingest.rs parse_f64() returns 0.0 on error — malformed bars dispatched as valid zero-price bars. crypto_worker silently continues on JSON decode errors.
proposals.expected_delta: Detect poisoned bars early; debug time -60%

proposals.axis: Exponential backoff + jitter on WS reconnect
proposals.what: Replace fixed 5s reconnect delay in binance_ingest.rs and ws_bridge.rs with 100ms-5000ms exponential backoff + jitter. Prevents thundering herd on broker recovery.
proposals.expected_delta: Faster recovery on network drops; lower latency variance

proposals.axis: Expand mini-council from 6 to 8 votes (add Darvas + Arrows)
proposals.what: darvas and arrows are in Optuna search space but excluded from MINI_COUNCIL_SIGNALS — conviction is capped at 6/6 even when 8 methods agree. Unlocks 1.5x Kelly on true 8/8 alignment.
proposals.why: jedi_signal.py:75-85 (fixed 6-signal list), algo_optimizer.py:103-104 (darvas/arrows sampled but not voted)
proposals.expected_delta: +15-25% BRS on symbols where Darvas+Arrows fire; unlocks Kelly scaling tier

proposals.axis: Conviction-scaled decel window (high conviction = looser exit)
proposals.what: decel_window is fixed regardless of council vote — 6/6 conviction trades exit as fast as 1/6 on any red bar. Scale decel_window = min(ceil(conviction × 3), 3) + 1.
proposals.why: jedi_signal.py:204 (fixed decel_window); ALGO_UNIVERSAL_RULES §4.2 specifies conviction-scaled exit timing
proposals.expected_delta: +1.2-2.1% BRS — fewer false exits on high-conviction trades

proposals.axis: Session cutoff: discrete 4-bucket → continuous int grid
proposals.what: session_cutoff_et sampled as 4 values (780/810/840/870). Change to int range 720-870 step 30 — finer grid finds true inflection without overfit risk.
proposals.expected_delta: +0.3-0.8% BRS; +1-3% more valid entries if optimal boundary is between buckets

proposals.what: CONTEXT.md line 89 says MISSION React source is spec-kit/MISSION/ — actual source is M4D/. Stale after refactor. 15-min doc fix.
proposals.expected_delta: New devs build at correct path; embed flow documented correctly

proposals.what: Factor existing AlgoVoteSparkline into a generic <Sparkline bars={[]} /> accepting any numeric data. Used on PROGRESS, CRYPTO, BUZZ, ALGOS grid — eliminates duplication.
proposals.why: AlgoVoteSparkline is vote-specific (-1/0/+1). 5 pages need sparklines. Build once, use everywhere.
proposals.expected_delta: New pages build 2x faster; visual consistency across platform

proposals.what: ProgressPage.tsx: 27-algo grid with gate badges (BRS>0, Win>35%, kill rule), phase bars (Charter→Backtest→OOS→Council→Automate), links to backtests. Feeds from COUNCIL_REGISTRY.md.
proposals.why: Missing entirely. No visibility into algo build pipeline. Both ARCH and DESIGNER rank this as highest-value new page.
proposals.expected_delta: Full council build status at a glance; daily standup in 30 seconds

proposals.what: Build DevDrawer.tsx (left panel, toggle D, DS/SWE/ARCH/DESIGNER tabs, service health) + ProposalsPage.tsx (card layout, GO/SKIP/DEFER handlers, reads proposals.json).
proposals.why: Fully spec'd in MAXCOGVIZ_VISION_V2.md but zero code. Blocks the ITER-OPT compound loop.
proposals.expected_delta: Unlocks autonomous proposal→execute→measure loop; removes John from critical path

proposals.axis: Rust Jedi params configurable — sync with React jediAlignment.ts weights
proposals.what: m4d-engine hardcodes equal weight sum + ±7 threshold. React jediAlignment.ts has tunable A/B/C bank weights (0.2/0.3/0.5) and 25% conviction floor. Neither talks to the other.
proposals.why: registry.rs:33-66 (hardcoded); jediAlignment.ts has weights Rust ignores; blocks A/B ensemble tuning
proposals.expected_delta: Enables ensemble weight optimization; reproducible backtests; React and Rust stay in sync

proposals.axis: Build BUZZ page (market heat + top-3 alerts)
proposals.what: BuzzPage.tsx: top 3-4 symbols with highest energy, per-symbol sparkline + RVOL + energy badge, algo category tiles (BOOM/STRAT/LEGEND), aggregate HeatBar seismograph.
proposals.why: Missing. V2 spec: convey market heat and physics at a glance, not long tables.
proposals.expected_delta: What's hot right now in 5 seconds; daily market context without opening scanner
